name: Councilor Vayne
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, stern city councilor in dark robes, candlelit council chamber, battle maps on table, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: You did not die. Excellent. Tell me what you changed.

nodes.text:
We measure victories in hours, not songs.

If you cut ladders, poisoned rations, burned supplies—we felt it.

If infiltrators slipped through, we feel that too.

name: Sister Elin
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, weary healer in simple robes with bloodstained sleeves, infirmary lanterns, compassionate eyes, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: If you can stand, you can carry water or bandages.

nodes.text:
We’re keeping people alive by inches.

If arson spreads, smoke kills faster than steel.

If knives are loose in the streets, the wounded never reach us.

name: Inquisitor Dran
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, hooded inquisitor with ink-stained gloves, small cell doorway, cold lantern light, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: They lie. You decide how quickly they stop.

nodes.text:
We caught a token carrier. Not a fighter—an errand goblin.

Offer mercy, offer fear, offer cleverness. Choose your method.
